title: huidev2025/CSF
summary: CSF是一个基于LLM的自然人机协作框架，通过自然语言和目的性设计，消除了RAG和代理编排的需求，旨在提高AI开发效率和协作体验。该框架采用Pang原则，提供了一种全新的AI方法论。，基于模型推理的架构
description: A human–AI collaboration framework that works with LLM nature, not around it — natural language and purpose make RAG and agent orchestration unnecessary. Home of the Pang Principle.
